instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: jungle waterfall ruins.

Patch:
- remove sv_034-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_034-ellipse-009.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#e03a2a"
- download-sv_034-ellipse-001.cx: 243.0 -> 200
- download-sv_034-line-006.stroke-width: 8.0 -> 3
- download-sv_034-ellipse-002.opacity: 0.32 -> 0.7
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#cfe8d0" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e8f0c8" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fall14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#eafdff" /><stop offset="0.6" stop-color="#bfe8f0" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#8fd0e0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pool14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7fd0c8" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#2a8a7a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="rock14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7a8a6a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#4a5a3a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="stone14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#a8a89a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#787868" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="mist14" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="20" /></filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="1600" height="1000" fill="url(#sky14)" id="download-sv_034-rect-001" />

  
  <g filter="url(#mist14)">
    <ellipse cx="243" cy="160" rx="360" ry="180" fill="#6a9a5a" opacity="0.7" id="download-sv_034-ellipse-001" />
    <ellipse cx="800" cy="120" rx="420" ry="180" fill="#5a8a4a" opacity="0.32" id="download-sv_034-ellipse-002" />
    <ellipse cx="1400" cy="160" rx="360" ry="180" fill="#6a9a5a" opacity="0.7" id="download-sv_034-ellipse-003" />
  </g>

  
  <path d="M0 0 L0 720 Q120 700 240 720 L320 200 Q280 80 200 60 L0 40 Z" fill="url(#rock14)" id="download-sv_034-path-001" />
  <path d="M1600 0 L1600 720 Q1480 700 1360 720 L1280 200 Q1320 80 1400 60 L1600 40 Z" fill="url(#rock14)" id="download-sv_034-path-002" />
  
  <path d="M460 180 L1140 180 L1180 700 L420 700 Z" fill="#3a4a2e" id="download-sv_034-path-003" />

  
  <g>
    <rect x="660" y="180" width="280" height="560" fill="url(#fall14)" id="download-sv_034-rect-002" />
    <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="700" y1="200" x2="700" y2="720" id="download-sv_034-line-001" /><line x1="740" y1="200" x2="738" y2="720" id="download-sv_034-line-002" /><line x1="800" y1="200" x2="800" y2="720" id="download-sv_034-line-003" />
      <line x1="860" y1="200" x2="862" y2="720" id="download-sv_034-line-004" /><line x1="900" y1="200" x2="900" y2="720" id="download-sv_034-line-005" />
    </g>
    
    <rect x="980" y="280" width="80" height="420" fill="url(#fall14)" opacity="0.85" id="download-sv_034-rect-003" />
    <line x1="1020" y1="290" x2="1020" y2="680" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="8" opacity="0.6" id="download-sv_034-line-006" />
  </g>

  
  <g transform="translate(420 480)">
    
    <polygon points="0,200 360,200 320,150 40,150" fill="url(#stone14)" id="download-sv_034-polygon-001" />
    <polygon points="40,150 320,150 290,108 70,108" fill="#9a9a8a" id="download-sv_034-polygon-002" />
    <polygon points="70,108 290,108 264,70 96,70" fill="#8a8a7a" id="download-sv_034-polygon-003" />
    <polygon points="96,70 264,70 240,40 120,40" fill="#9a9a8a" id="download-sv_034-polygon-004" />
    
    <rect x="160" y="120" width="44" height="80" fill="#2a3022" id="download-sv_034-rect-004" />
    <polygon points="158,120 206,120 182,96" fill="#3a4030" id="download-sv_034-polygon-005" />
    
    <g stroke="#5a5a4a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5"><line x1="60" y1="160" x2="100" y2="190" id="download-sv_034-line-007" /><line x1="280" y1="120" x2="300" y2="150" id="download-sv_034-line-008" /></g>
  </g>
  
  <g fill="url(#stone14)">
    <rect x="300" y="640" width="40" height="120" id="download-sv_034-rect-005" /><rect x="296" y="632" width="48" height="12" id="download-sv_034-rect-006" />
    <rect x="1240" y="660" width="40" height="100" id="download-sv_034-rect-007" /><rect x="1236" y="652" width="48" height="12" id="download-sv_034-rect-008" />
    <rect x="1180" y="700" width="36" height="60" id="download-sv_034-rect-009" />
  </g>

  
  <g stroke="#3a6a2a" stroke-width="4" fill="none" opacity="0.85">

    <path d="M700 480 Q720 540 690 600" id="download-sv_034-path-005" />

  </g>
  
  <g fill="#2a5a22">
    <path d="M0 1000 L0 880 Q120 820 200 880 Q160 940 80 960 Q40 980 0 1000 Z" id="download-sv_034-path-008" />
    <path d="M1600 1000 L1600 880 Q1480 820 1400 880 Q1440 940 1520 960 Q1560 980 1600 1000 Z" id="download-sv_034-path-009" />
  </g>

    <path d="M220 1000 Q160 920 220 860 Q280 920 220 1000 Z" id="download-sv_034-path-011" />
    <path d="M1480 980 Q1420 900 1480 840 Q1540 900 1480 980 Z" id="download-sv_034-path-012" /><line x1="1480" y1="980" x2="1480" y2="850" stroke="#2a5a1a" stroke-width="2" id="download-sv_034-line-010" />

  </g>

  
  <ellipse cx="800" cy="730" rx="280" ry="70" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.5" filter="url(#mist14)" id="download-sv_034-ellipse-008" />

  
  <g transform="translate(420 360)">

  </g>
  <g transform="translate(1180 320) scale(0.8)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="22" ry="12" fill="#f0c83a" id="download-sv_034-ellipse-010" /><circle cx="-18" cy="-6" r="8" fill="#f0c83a" id="download-sv_034-circle-008" />
